systems.system_notes: Distal humerus locking plate system supporting parallel or perpendicular plating constructs in the DePuy Synthes trauma portfolio.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes technique resources reference dedicated distal humerus plating instrumentation for the LCP system.

components.component_notes: Official technique-library resources identify the distal humerus plate family within the LCP system.
Official technique resources describe locking screw fixation used with the distal humerus plate construct.
Official technique resources describe the dedicated guide and instrument workflow for distal humerus plating.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the distal humerus plate family and technique references but do not expose a full product-code matrix in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper sterile implant listing, inventory form, or ordering guide pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
